title: Hot Cache Meltdown
subtitle: Read spikes are hammering primary storage
objective: Design a read path that offloads burst traffic from persistent storage.
constraints: Prevent direct read storms to storage

concepts.title: Cache Fronting
concepts.description: Serve hot reads via cache between API and storage.

concepts.title: Elastic Entry
concepts.description: Use load balancer to spread read bursts across API instances.

concepts.title: Persistent Source
concepts.description: Write path must still reach durable storage.
